center.name: Leonhard Stejneger
center.summary: Leonhard Stejneger是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Brown-backed solitaire、伊豆鶇，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown-backed solitaire (Myadestes occidentalis) is a thrush found in montane pine-oak woodlands from Mexico to Honduras

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Izu thrush or Izu Islands thrush (Turdus celaenops) is a bird of the thrush family native to Japan
